subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: We come now to the subject of transformation in the nature of matter; and we wish to show you that that which is temporal is essentially different from that which is eternal
subcodes.subjects: @law of transformation and change, @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @elementary matter cannot be annihilated, @the ephemeral and the eternal
